overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic architectural complex at night. The scene transitions from narrow corridors with teal uplighting to an open plaza with trees and city views, featuring dramatic neon and artificial lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered corridor with teal tile walls

events.description: transitioning from teal-tiled interior walls to raw concrete walls with uplighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor, moving toward the illuminated passage ahead

tall concrete wall with horizontal texture and warm uplighting at base
continuous strip lights illuminating the walkway from ground level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor with distinctive teal-tiled walls illuminated by cyan lighting. As the character walks forward, the architecture transitions to raw concrete walls with warm white uplighting, creating a dramatic shift in color temperature while maintaining the enclosed corridor feel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor walkway with tall concrete walls

events.description: passing a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the illuminated concrete pathway, approaching and passing another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: female character in dark clothing with short hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive vertical concrete structure with weathered texture and horizontal lines
distant glowing city buildings visible through gaps in the architecture
vertical pink and blue neon sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated outdoor walkway flanked by tall concrete walls with dramatic uplighting. A female pedestrian passes by walking in the opposite direction. The corridor opens slightly to reveal the Night City skyline with neon signs glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza with trees and illuminated planters

events.description: exiting the covered concrete walkway into an open plaza with trees and city views

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, observing the trees and surrounding cityscape

large rectangular white planters with integrated lighting
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
low white walls with soft uplighting defining the plaza perimeter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious rooftop plaza featuring trees in illuminated planters and white architectural walls. The wet reflective ground mirrors the city lights from the surrounding Night City skyline, creating a serene atmosphere contrasting with the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to covered walkway approaching street exit

events.description: re-entering the covered concrete corridor from the open plaza
approaching the corridor exit with brighter city street lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward the city street exit visible ahead

entered.detail: large rectangular opening at the end of the corridor revealing the city street beyond

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open plaza and re-enters the covered concrete walkway, heading toward a brightly lit exit. The corridor frames a view of the bustling city street ahead, with the urban landscape transitioning from the quiet architectural space back to the vibrant Night City environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic architectural complex that transitions from enclosed, moody corridors into a wide, reflective rooftop plaza before returning to the urban bustle. It begins in a narrow corridor with teal-tiled walls and cyan lighting, which gradually shifts into raw concrete surfaces illuminated by warm white uplighting. As the character moves along an elevated outdoor walkway, the space opens slightly to reveal the distant neon glow of the Night City skyline just as a pedestrian passes by. The scene then expands into a spacious rooftop plaza where trees in illuminated planters and wet, reflective ground mirror the surrounding city lights. Finally, the camera leaves the open plaza to re-enter a covered concrete walkway, framing a view of the vibrant, bustling city street ahead.
